arts.ttl: Fermin becomes latest Barca player needing trip to dentist
arts.sum: Barcelona star Fermin Lopez has become the latest player needing a trip to the dentist after Sunday’s clash with Leganes in La Liga . The incident comes just after Dani Olmo lost a tooth during Barcelona’s clash with Real Betis in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Pedri begs 'half asleep' Barça to 'turn it around'
arts.sum: Midfielder Pedri said Barcelona must turn things around quickly as their alarming run of form continued with a shock 1-0 defeat at home to Leganés on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Pedri tries to explain where it’s all going wrong for Barca in La Liga
arts.sum: We woke up, we created chances but we lacked that spark to get going well and score goals,” he told the media. “We have to be more clear in front of goal if we want to win games.

arts.ttl: Barca confirm Yamal set to undergo tests after Leganes defeat
arts.sum: Barcelona assistant coach Marcus Sorg has confirmed Lamine Yamal is set to undergo tests after picking up an issue during the defeat to Leganes . Sorg was asked about Yamal after the game and offered the following update.

arts.ttl: Leader Barcelona loses to Leganes as Atletico Madrid moves level on points at top of Spanish league
arts.sum: Playing in the first of five La Liga matches on Sunday, Atletico won its sixth consecutive league game to move a point clear of Real, which could only draw 3-3 with Real Vallecano on Saturday. Barcelona stayed top of the Spanish league despite a shock 1-0 home defeat on Sunday to lowly Leganes, a team that had not won away all season.

arts.ttl: Sergio Gonzalez effort enough as Leganes record famous victory at Barcelona
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid closed the gap as the top two stumbled.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star left ‘very angry’ after Leganés defeat
arts.sum: A leading member of the midfield ranks at Barcelona has admitted to being left furious by the club’s defeat at the hands of Leganés. Barcelona, of course, marked their return…

arts.ttl: Pedri calls on Barcelona to transfer Champions League form into La Liga matters
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri had a clear message for his teammates after their 1-0 La Liga loss to Leganes. The Catalan giants have now lost successive home league games and end the weekend on top of the table only by goal difference ahead of Atletico Madrid. arts.ttl: Hansi Flick vs Xavi: Barcelona after 18 games in La Liga this season vs last season
arts.sum: An insight into the respective records of Barcelona after 18 games of the La Liga season this year versus last has this evening been provided. This, of course, comes fresh…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 0-1 Leganes: Highlights, man of the match, stats as visitors record historic victory
arts.sum: Barcelona suffer their fourth La Liga defeat of the campaign as Leganes stun the division leaders with a 1-0 victory at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.
